expressions.korean: 개인적인 이유
expressions.english: personal reason
expressions.notes:
개인적이다 = to be personal; to be private
개인적인 is the adjective form of 개인적이다.

expressions.korean: 이유를 묻다
expressions.english: to ask the reason

expressions.korean: 이유를 대다
expressions.english: to give a reason

expressions.korean: 이유가 뭔가요?
expressions.english: What is the reason?
expressions.notes:
뭔 = what; something
뭔 is the contracted form of 무엇.

expressions.korean: 지각한 이유가 뭐예요?
expressions.english:
What is the reason you were late?
Why were you late?

expressions.korean: 아무 이유 없이 그냥 좋아요.
expressions.english: I just like (something/someone) for no reason.
expressions.notes:
아무 = (not) any
없이 = to not have, not exist; to be not there
그냥 = just, only, simply
좋아요 = to be good, likable; to be desirable; to be nice; to like

expressions.korean: 이유가 원지 절대 말은 안 해요.
expressions.english: He won't say what the reason is at all.
expressions.notes:
절대 = never
말 = language; what one says; expression; word; term
안 = not
말을 하다 = to speak; to talk; to tell; to say
-나고 is used when quoting or delivering what someone has asked.
-(으)면 = if + S + V; when/once + S + V
하다 = to do

expressions.korean: 이유가 뭐나고 물으면 어떻게 하죠?
expressions.english: What should I do if he asks what the reason is?

expressions.korean: 정당한 이유도 없이 회사에서 잘렸어요.
expressions.english: I was fired from the company without a justifiable reason.
expressions.notes:
정당하다 = to be reasonable, to be fair; to be justifiable
정당한 is the adjective form of 정당하다.
-도 = too, also
회사 = company; office
잘리다 = (informal) to get fired; to get cut

expressions.korean: 그렇게 그 사람을 미워하는 이유가 뭐예요?
expressions.english: What is the reason you hate that person so much?
expressions.notes:
그렇게 = like that; such + adjective/adverb
그 사람 = that person; he, she
미워하다 = to hate, dislike

expressions.korean: 폭력은 어떤 이유로도 정당화 될 수 없어요.
expressions.english: Violence cannot be justified by any reason.
expressions.notes:
폭력 = violence
어떤 = what kind of; which
정당화 되다 = to be justified
-(으)로 수 없다 = to be unable to + V, can't

expressions.korean: 가장 어리다는 이유로 귀여움을 듬뿍 받았어요.
expressions.english:
I received a lot of attention because of the fact I was the youngest.
People liked me a lot because I was the youngest.
expressions.notes:
가장 = the most
어리다 = to be young
귀여움(을) 받다 = to be favored or liked by someone

expressions.korean: 그 이유 때문인지 다른 이유 때문인지 모르겠어요.
expressions.english: I don't know if it is because of that reason or another.
expressions.notes:
때문이다 = it is because (of) ...
다른 = other; another
-때문인지 -때문인지 모르다 = to not know if it's because of + N₁ or + N₂

expressions.korean: 그 사람이 그렇게 행동한 데에는 다 이유가 있어요.
expressions.english: There is a reason as to why he acted that way.
expressions.notes:
행동하다 = to act, behave
-(으)ㄴ/는 데(에) = in + V-ing, for + V-ing
있다 = to be there; to exist; to have

expressions.korean: 전화 할 때마다 전화기가 꺼져 있는 이유가 뭐예요?
expressions.english: What is the reason your phone is turned off every time I call?
expressions.notes:
전화(를) 하다 = to call, make a phone call
-(으)ㄹ 때마다 = whenever + S + V
전화기 = telephone
꺼져 있다 = to be turned off

expressions.korean: 제가 오늘 늦은 데에는 어쩔 수 없는 이유가 있어요.
expressions.english: I couldn't do anything about the reason I was late to work today.
expressions.notes:
늦다 = to be late
어쩔 수 없다 = can't help, can't but; there is nothing + S + can do about

expressions.korean: 그 사람이 그렇게 인기가 있는 건 다 이유가 있어요.
expressions.english: There is a reason why he is so popular.

expressions.korean: 타당한 이유가 있으면 부모님이 허락해 주실 거예요.
expressions.english: If there is an appropriate reason, your parents will give you permission.
expressions.notes:
타당하다 = to be appropriate; to be reasonable
타당한 is the adjective form of 타당하다.
부모님 = parents
허락하다 = to allow, give permission
-이/이/여 주시다 = (honorific) someone does something for me/us

expressions.korean: 그 사람이 여기에 오지 않은 이유를 저는 알고 있어요.
expressions.english: I know the reason why he did not come here.
expressions.notes:
여기 = here, this place
오다 = to come
알다 = to know
-고 있다 = to be + V-ing

expressions.korean: 죄송하지만 개인적인 이유라서 자세히 말씀드릴 수가 없어요.
expressions.english: I'm sorry, but I cannot tell you specifically because it is a personal reason.
expressions.notes:
죄송하지만 = I'm sorry but ...
-(이)라서 = because + S + be + N
자세하다 = to be specific, detailed
자세히 is an adverb form of 자세하다.
말씀드리다 = (polite) to talk; to say; to speak; to tell
-(으)ㄹ 수가 없다 = to be not able to + V, can't
